jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.location: Hybrid (Chicago), Remote (San Francisco), Full-time Curie is a telehealth platform combining clinical expertise with AI to deliver personalized, accessible care — intelligent intake, treatment matching, and AI-powered tools for clinicians. Team includes ex-founders, clinicians, and engineers from Stanford, Harvard, UCLA, Berkeley, and AWS. Well-funded and growing fast. We're hiring an AI Engineer to own the microservice layer powering our clinical AI: agentic intake workflows, RAG pipelines grounded in medical guidelines, session/memory management for long-running clinical agents, and HIPAA-grade observability and safety guardrails. You'll shape the AI architecture of a healthcare product from the ground up. Stack: Langgraph, Langfuse, Go, Python, TS, GraphQL, gRPC/Connect-RPC, PostgreSQL, GCP/Vertex AI, AWS Bedrock. Looking for: 5+ years engineering, meaningful production AI/ML experience, LLMs in production (prompting, structured output, evals), RAG and agentic patterns, comfort across Go + Python + cloud. Bonus: FHIR/HL7, fine-tuning, healthcare AI background, startup experience. Apply: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/curie/cea56a9a-d238-4101-a56c-f94a4...
